Class Game

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Game
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Game extends Object implements Serializable
Root of the game model and the entry point for every game action. It holds the players, the Board, the decks and the current GameState, and it delegates each action (startMatch, pickCards, …) to that state (State pattern). After every change it notifies its GameObservers.
See Also:

    void
    handleEraChange()
    Applies an Era change: clears Era-III-destroyed buildings (only on Era III), shifts surviving buildings down, and reveals the market buildings of the new Era onto the board.
    boolean
    isGameEnded()
    Checks if the game has ended.
    boolean
    isGameStarted()
    Checks if the game has started (past setup phase).
    void
    notifyObservers()
    Notifies every registered observer; an exception in one does not stop the others.
    void
    pickBonusCard(Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the end-of-round bonus pick by delegating to the current state.

    Resolves a player's card pick by delegating to the current state.

    Places a player's totem on an offer tile by delegating to the current state.

    Unregisters an observer.

    Resolves the round's events by delegating to the current state.
    void
    setActivePlayer(Player activePlayer)
    Sets the active player and notifies observers.
    void
    setCurrentEra(Era currentEra)
    Sets the current Era, notifying observers only if it actually changed.
    void
    setCurrentRound(int currentRound)
    Sets the current round, notifying observers only if it actually changed.
    void
    setState(GameState state)
    Replaces the current state and notifies observers.
    void
    setupDecks()
    Loads the cards from the JSON resources and builds the tribe deck (shuffled Era by Era, with the final events at the bottom) and the building market, revealing the Era I buildings on the board.
    void
    startMatch()
    Starts the match by delegating to the current state.
    void
    updateRound()
    Performs the end-of-round update by delegating to the current state.

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game(List<Player> players)
      Creates a new game in the initial setup phase.
      Parameters:
      players - the participating players (copied defensively)

  • Method Details

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(GameObserver observer)
      Registers an observer (ignored if null or already registered).
      Parameters:
      observer - the observer to add

    • removeObserver

      public void removeObserver(GameObserver observer)
      Unregisters an observer.
      Parameters:
      observer - the observer to remove

    • notifyObservers

      public void notifyObservers()
      Notifies every registered observer; an exception in one does not stop the others.

    • getObserverCount

      public int getObserverCount()
      Returns:
      the number of currently registered observers

    • setState

      public void setState(GameState state)
      Replaces the current state and notifies observers.
      Parameters:
      state - the new state

    • startMatch

      public void startMatch()
      Starts the match by delegating to the current state.

    • placeTotemOnOffer

      public void placeTotemOnOffer(Player player, OfferTile tile)
      Places a player's totem on an offer tile by delegating to the current state.
      Parameters:
      player - the player acting
      tile - the chosen offer tile

    • pickCards

      public void pickCards(Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
      Resolves a player's card pick by delegating to the current state.
      Parameters:
      player - the player acting
      selectedCards - the cards the player chose

    • pickBonusCard

      public void pickBonusCard(Player player, Card bonusCard)
      Resolves the end-of-round bonus pick by delegating to the current state.
      Parameters:
      player - the player entitled to the bonus pick
      bonusCard - the chosen card

    • resolveEvents

      public void resolveEvents()
      Resolves the round's events by delegating to the current state.

    • updateRound

      public void updateRound()
      Performs the end-of-round update by delegating to the current state.

    • determineWinner

      public Player determineWinner()
      Determines the winner by delegating to the current state.
      Returns:
      the winning player

    • getCurrentPhaseName

      public String getCurrentPhaseName()
      Returns:
      the name of the current phase

    • setupDecks

      public void setupDecks()
      Loads the cards from the JSON resources and builds the tribe deck (shuffled Era by Era, with the final events at the bottom) and the building market, revealing the Era I buildings on the board. Player count drives how many cards and buildings are used.

    • handleEraChange

      public void handleEraChange()
      Applies an Era change: clears Era-III-destroyed buildings (only on Era III), shifts surviving buildings down, and reveals the market buildings of the new Era onto the board.

    • getPlayerWithLeftmostTotem

      public Player getPlayerWithLeftmostTotem()
      Returns:
      the player whose totem occupies the leftmost (lowest-letter) offer tile, or null if the offer track is empty

    • getPlayers

      public List<Player> getPlayers()
      Returns:
      the players, in current turn order

    • getBoard

      public Board getBoard()
      Returns:
      the game board

    • getCurrentRound

      public int getCurrentRound()
      Returns:
      the current round number (1-10)

    • getCurrentEra

      public Era getCurrentEra()
      Returns:
      the current Era

    • getActivePlayer

      public Player getActivePlayer()
      Returns:
      the player whose turn it is, or null

    • getTribeDeck

      public List<Card> getTribeDeck()
      Returns:
      the tribe deck (cards still to be drawn)

    • getCurrentState

      public GameState getCurrentState()
      Returns:
      the current game state

    • setActivePlayer

      public void setActivePlayer(Player activePlayer)
      Sets the active player and notifies observers.
      Parameters:
      activePlayer - the new active player

    • setCurrentEra

      public void setCurrentEra(Era currentEra)
      Sets the current Era, notifying observers only if it actually changed.
      Parameters:
      currentEra - the new Era

    • setCurrentRound

      public void setCurrentRound(int currentRound)
      Sets the current round, notifying observers only if it actually changed.
      Parameters:
      currentRound - the new round number

    • isGameStarted

      public boolean isGameStarted()
      Checks if the game has started (past setup phase).
      Returns:
      true if the game is in progress

    • isGameEnded

      public boolean isGameEnded()
      Checks if the game has ended.
      Returns:
      true if the game is in the end game state
